items.title: It’s pretty obvious that every move Brad has made this offseason is with the intention of eventually uniting Cooper Flagg and Dylan Harper. 😆 🤔
items.author: Chad Finn
items.body_excerpt:
It’s pretty obvious that every move Brad has made this offseason is with the intention of eventually uniting Cooper Flagg and Dylan Harper. 😆 🤔 

(Not totally kidding about Cooper. He’s playing here someday.)

items.title: More from Brian Wright on Dylan Harper and De'Aaron Fox:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
More from Brian Wright on Dylan Harper and De'Aaron Fox:

"They're are a tough matchup. We'll continue to put them in situations for them to be at their best...They'll learn from this year on how they continue to play off one another and support one another and go from there."
